title: Use AI to alter item names
excerpt: Our current workflow has the our leads first and last names as the item name. We want to separate these two into two fields, and alter the item name to just be the last name and extract the first name to another column.

posts.author: dfrankel (Darian)
posts.cookedHtml: Our current workflow has the our leads first and last names as the item name. We want to separate these two into two fields, and alter the item name to just be the last name and extract the first name to another column.
